case_title: BUILDING RESOURCES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. VS. DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH.
